text: 100 days of code I am feeling good after watching your enthusiasm and in today's video I will give a shoutout to all of you who have solved our exercise 1 and then I will tell you the solution let's go to the computer screen and let's get started intro music intro music intro music intro music so I have come to my computer screen and as you can see I am going to open the solution's rappel I have come to my rappel 0 to hero day 8, we will see the solution but along with the solution we will see what all people did in day 7 and in day 7 where is my day 7 rappel I will open it and I will give a shoutout to all of you who posted their comment and most importantly posted the solution so I will click on the cover page and see all these people are posting so fast we need this kind of tempo we will rock in 100 days of code 20 seconds ago, 23 seconds ago I want that we rock in this 100 days of code series so you see what we talked about we talked about making a calculator yes I know I told you some things like what is data type we talked about all these things but this exercise was very simple and I got comments and I said in the video that why are you making such an easy thing some people are starting programming here, you give me 5 to 6 days time and see where I will take the level and I will ensure that everyone understands now here we have to add, subtract, multiply and divide I didn't say modulo or floor division you can add if you want but here I will simply say a is equal to 56 and b is equal to 7 or 3 and see what I am going to do I will make it easy so that I can verify my calculation the value of and I will write 50 so I will write 50 or I will write a and then I will write plus and then I will write value of b 3 is plus basically I am adding I will put a comma here by doing this it will be the value of a string then this is a string and this is a number it will be printed then I will put a comma and here I will put a comma and print a plus b and now you see as soon as I run it its output will come so I can do the same thing that I have done here I can do the same thing with other operations now see I don't need to put this I don't need to give space automatically a space comes when we put a comma in print so this is going to be printed now I have to replicate this alt plus shift plus down arrow is a shortcut of vs code line gets replicated line alt plus shift plus down arrow I am not doing any magic I am not doing any magic and whatever magic I am doing you can also do it its a simple thing not only in this series but in life whatever I am doing you can do it and if anyone is doing it you can do it if anyone says you can't do it then he is lying to you so here I will do value of a divided by 3 is this a by b value will come 50 plus 3 now I don't know what to do I am pressing alt shift and clicking I am pressing alt and clicking something like this I will press alt and click and I will get multiple cursor and I can edit in all of them you can see how amazing this is and you should know this so here you can see all the shortcuts of vs code are available in raplet I am using raplet so that things become easy you can see here value of 50 plus 3 50 minus 3 50 multiplied by 3 and 50 divided by 3 value is also here and that's about it this is the solution to our first exercise no.1 now I will come to exercise no.1 in rapel one reload is required see who all are giving solution first solution is given by Taha Pasha Ashitosh Zolte has given 4 seconds I hope I pronounced your name right if I pronounce someone's name wrong then please forgive me otherwise comments will come that my name is pronounced wrong now here I am going to load more comments I know I won't be able to reach below but it will be unfair if I don't so I am loading more comments what is this I am going to take my time and I am going to oops I will scroll it down give me some time so I have scrolled it I have to see here are some raples I am going to see them link was not working I have uploaded this on day 6 link was not working I think link will work click once calculator give shoutout to all shoutout to all with high tempo by the way in case all these disqualified man disqualified just kidding but actually disqualified I am kidding but actually disqualified it doesn't matter but it is disqualified which I have not taught yet did I say
